nasb.text: But if they do not have self-control, let them marry; for it is better to marry than to burn with passion.

esv.text: But if they cannot exercise self-control, they should marry. For it is better to marry than to burn with passion.

cnv.text: 但如果不能自制，就應當結婚，因為結婚總比慾火焚身好。

ccb.text: 但如果他们不能自制，就应该结婚，因为与其欲火攻心还不如结婚为好。

csbs.text: 但如果他们不能自制，就应该结婚，因为结婚总比心如火烧更好。
